description_long: This dam structure features a large, curved retaining wall with a smooth, light wood-textured surface and prominent safety railings along the top perimeter. The central section includes a deep, bowl-like depression, likely for water collection or flow management, and a raised platform with stairs on one side, providing access to the upper level. The dam is segmented by a dark, rectangular channel running through its center, possibly simulating a spillway or maintenance access. Circular markings are visible on the inner curved surfaces, adding to the industrial aesthetic. The structure is elevated on sturdy supports, with a stairway leading up to the main platform, and the entire perimeter is enclosed by railings for safety. The overall design suggests a modern, urban dam intended for controlled water management in a city park or recreational area.
description: A modern, light wood-textured dam with curved retaining walls, central channel, and safety railings, featuring a raised platform and stair access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the dam, the central channel, and the upper platform with railings and stairs.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the deep bowl-like depression, central channel, and the stairway leading to the upper platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dam, the elevated platform, and the stair structure on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view focusing on the interior curved surfaces, circular markings, and the central channel.
